metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: A sudden storm damaged the old bridge across the river. Engineers closed the old bridge to all traffic. Workers repaired the old bridge with new steel beams. Cars and trucks crossed the old bridge without any trouble.

A broken pipe flooded the village bakery during the busy breakfast rush. Plumbers closed the village bakery and isolated the damaged water line. Workers dried the village bakery and replaced the ruined wooden floorboards. Customers filled the village bakery and praised the clean interior.

A lightning strike shattered the red lighthouse lamp during a coastal storm. The keeper closed the red lighthouse and requested thick replacement glass. Technicians fitted the red lighthouse with a stronger rotating lens. Ships passed the red lighthouse safely through the cleared channel.

A sharp stone punctured the school bus tire on a country road. The driver parked the school bus beside a broad gravel shoulder. A mechanic replaced the school bus tire and checked every wheel. Students rode the school bus safely back toward the village.

Heavy snow cracked the mountain cabin roof above the sleeping loft. Rangers closed the mountain cabin and cleared deep snow from nearby paths. Carpenters repaired the mountain cabin with stronger rafters and fresh shingles. Hikers occupied the mountain cabin and praised the repaired roof.

Vandals splashed bright paint across the bronze statue during the night. City workers covered the bronze statue and restricted access around the plaza. Conservators cleaned the bronze statue with gentle brushes and safe solvents. Visitors admired the bronze statue under fresh protective lighting in the plaza.

A worn pump stopped the city fountain during a crowded festival. Maintenance crews drained the city fountain and removed loose stone panels. Plumbers installed a new pump beneath the city fountain basin. Clear water filled the city fountain and delighted nearby families.

A snapped rope disabled the wooden sailboat during a coastal race. The crew steered the wooden sailboat into a sheltered rocky cove. Sailors repaired the wooden sailboat with spare rope and canvas. The wooden sailboat rejoined the race and reached the harbor safely.

A burst pipe soaked the public library during a cold weekend. Staff members closed the public library and moved books onto dry shelves. Restoration crews dried the public library and replaced damaged ceiling panels. Readers entered the public library and borrowed books without disruption.

A long drought damaged the community garden across several neglected planting beds. Volunteers covered the community garden with mulch and repaired leaking hoses. Neighbors watered the community garden and planted hardy vegetable seedlings. Fresh produce filled the community garden and supplied the neighborhood pantry.

A jammed gear stopped the stone clock tower during a busy market day. Caretakers closed the stone clock tower and inspected the dusty mechanism. A clockmaker repaired the stone clock tower with a newly cut gear. The stone clock tower rang clearly and restored the familiar town signal.

An electrical fault darkened the small theater during an evening rehearsal. The manager emptied the small theater and called qualified electrical workers. Electricians rewired the small theater and tested every emergency light. Audiences filled the small theater and enjoyed several uninterrupted performances.

A heavy parcel snapped the cargo bicycle chain on a steep hill. The courier stopped the cargo bicycle beside a secure loading bay. A mechanic fitted the cargo bicycle with a reinforced replacement chain. The courier completed every delivery using the cargo bicycle without further trouble.

A ceiling leak soaked the antique piano inside the recital room. Curators moved the antique piano away from the dripping plaster ceiling. A restorer dried the antique piano and replaced several warped keys. A pianist played the antique piano for an appreciative concert audience.

Technicians installed a new refrigerator inside the neighborhood clinic storage room. Patients visited the neighborhood clinic and received properly stored medicines.

Crews cleaned the desert observatory dome and serviced the rotation motors. Researchers reopened the desert observatory and captured sharp stellar images.

Rising seawater entered the coastal museum through a basement service door. Staff members closed the coastal museum and moved exhibits onto higher floors. Contractors drained the coastal museum and reinforced the vulnerable basement entrance. Visitors returned to the coastal museum and viewed every protected collection.

A delivery truck bent the iron railway gate at a busy crossing. Railway staff locked the iron railway gate and redirected nearby road traffic. Technicians straightened the iron railway gate and replaced the damaged hinges. Trains passed the iron railway gate beside orderly road traffic.

A lightning strike damaged the forest fire tower antenna above the canopy. Rangers closed the forest fire tower and reported the communication failure. Technicians replaced the forest fire tower antenna and grounded the metal frame. Lookouts occupied the forest fire tower and resumed wide-area fire checks.

A mechanic repaired the yellow food truck and installed a reliable battery. Customers surrounded the yellow food truck and ordered freshly cooked meals.

Contractors repaired the historic courthouse ceiling and secured the decorative molding. Legal proceedings returned to the historic courthouse under restored courtroom lights.

Glaziers repaired the glass greenhouse with stronger weather-resistant roof panels. Seedlings flourished inside the glass greenhouse under steady filtered sunlight.

A powerful wave broke the fishing pier railing near deep water. Harbor staff closed the fishing pier and posted warning signs ashore. Carpenters repaired the fishing pier with reinforced posts and broad rails. Anglers used the fishing pier and landed several large coastal fish.

A broken string interrupted the concert violin during an important rehearsal. The musician stored the concert violin inside a padded protective case. A luthier restrung the concert violin and adjusted the wooden bridge. The soloist played the concert violin through a successful public performance.

Mechanics repaired the children's carousel motor and inspected every painted seat. Children rode the children's carousel beneath bright music and spinning lights.

Engineers repaired the research submarine propeller and removed the tangled cable. Scientists guided the research submarine toward a successful seabed mapping mission.

Technicians repaired the public swimming pool filter and balanced the chemicals. Swimmers entered the public swimming pool under clear and safe conditions.

Crews repaired the radio tower antenna and reinforced the upper platform. Regional broadcasts reached listeners through the radio tower without further interruption.

Technicians repaired the town archive climate system and sealed leaking ducts. Researchers entered the town archive and consulted the protected historical records.

Technicians replaced the electric delivery van battery module and tested the controls. Couriers used the electric delivery van and completed the remaining deliveries.

noncausal_texts: The old bridge spanned a wide river with three stone arches. The old bridge carried a narrow road between two villages. The old bridge appeared on many postcards of the valley. The old bridge attracted photographers from distant towns.

The village bakery occupied a corner building beside the central square. The village bakery sold crusty loaves from a large brick oven. The village bakery displayed hand-painted signs above wide front windows. The village bakery attracted early workers from nearby farms and shops.

The red lighthouse stood on a rocky point above the northern harbor. The red lighthouse displayed broad white bands around a tapered brick tower. The red lighthouse guided fishing vessels through a narrow offshore passage. The red lighthouse attracted painters seeking dramatic views of the coastline.

The school bus carried forty padded seats behind a wide front windshield. The school bus served several farms across a large rural district. The school bus displayed bright safety markings along both metal sides. The school bus stored emergency supplies inside a locked rear compartment.

The mountain cabin stood among tall pines beneath a granite ridge. The mountain cabin contained a stone fireplace beside two wooden bunks. The mountain cabin offered broad views across a remote alpine valley. The mountain cabin sheltered hikers from strong winds and sudden snowfall.

The bronze statue portrayed a local musician holding a polished violin. The bronze statue occupied a circular pedestal near the concert hall. The bronze statue showed detailed folds across a long formal coat. The bronze statue attracted music students and curious visitors throughout the year.

The city fountain occupied the center of a broad public square. The city fountain featured carved dolphins around a shallow marble basin. The city fountain cooled nearby benches during warm summer afternoons. The city fountain appeared in paintings sold by local street artists.

The wooden sailboat carried a single cream sail above a narrow deck. The wooden sailboat rested in a small marina near the fishing docks. The wooden sailboat featured brass fittings along a dark polished hull. The wooden sailboat attracted beginners seeking quiet lessons on calm water.

The public library occupied a brick building beside the municipal park. The public library housed local histories inside a quiet upstairs reading room. The public library offered broad tables beneath tall arched windows. The public library served students, families, researchers, and retired residents.

The community garden occupied a sunny lot between two apartment buildings. The community garden contained raised beds bordered by recycled wooden boards. The community garden supported herbs, flowers, vegetables, and several berry bushes. The community garden welcomed residents from many ages and cultural backgrounds.

The stone clock tower rose above the roofs surrounding the market square. The stone clock tower contained brass gears inside a narrow wooden chamber. The stone clock tower displayed four painted faces toward different streets. The stone clock tower marked civic celebrations with a deep bronze bell.

The small theater occupied a converted warehouse near the central train station. The small theater seated two hundred guests beneath a painted plaster ceiling. The small theater hosted plays, lectures, concerts, and community award ceremonies. The small theater displayed vintage posters across a brick entrance corridor.

The cargo bicycle carried a broad wooden box between two front wheels. The cargo bicycle served shops along narrow streets near the old harbor. The cargo bicycle used thick tires suited for heavy urban deliveries. The cargo bicycle displayed reflective strips around a sturdy steel frame.

The antique piano featured carved walnut panels and ivory-colored wooden keys. The antique piano occupied a quiet recital room inside the music academy. The antique piano produced a warm tone across the middle register. The antique piano attracted advanced students and visiting concert performers.

The riverside mill stood beside a fast stream below the northern farms. The riverside mill contained heavy grinding stones beneath a timber roof. The riverside mill processed wheat, rye, barley, and locally grown corn. The riverside mill appeared in many landscape sketches from regional artists.

The neighborhood clinic occupied a white building near several apartment blocks. The neighborhood clinic contained six examination rooms around a bright central corridor. The neighborhood clinic provided vaccinations, routine checkups, and basic laboratory services. The neighborhood clinic served families from surrounding streets and nearby housing estates.

The blue tractor carried wide rear tires beneath an open metal canopy. The blue tractor worked across several fields surrounding a dairy farm. The blue tractor pulled plows, seed drills, trailers, and hay equipment. The blue tractor displayed faded lettering along a square engine cover.

The desert observatory stood on a dry plateau far from city lights. The desert observatory housed three telescopes beneath separate silver domes. The desert observatory recorded distant galaxies through exceptionally clear night skies. The desert observatory welcomed astronomy students during supervised research visits.

The coastal museum occupied a former customs house beside the main harbor. The coastal museum displayed ship models, navigation charts, and recovered maritime tools. The coastal museum featured broad windows overlooking fishing boats and cargo vessels. The coastal museum attracted travelers interested in regional seafaring history.

The iron railway gate crossed a narrow road beside the freight yard. The iron railway gate carried red warning lamps above striped metal bars. The iron railway gate separated road vehicles from two active train tracks. The iron railway gate appeared in photographs of the industrial district.

The forest fire tower rose above tall pines on a rocky ridge. The forest fire tower contained a small cabin beneath an open platform. The forest fire tower offered broad views across remote wooded valleys. The forest fire tower supported seasonal monitoring during periods of dry weather.

The yellow food truck parked near offices beside the central public plaza. The yellow food truck served grilled sandwiches, soups, salads, and hot coffee. The yellow food truck displayed a painted sun across both side panels. The yellow food truck contained a compact kitchen behind a wide service window.

The historic courthouse displayed portraits of judges along a broad central staircase. The historic courthouse hosted trials, registrations, ceremonies, and public legal records.
